name: shallowswe-floor-recal-oneshot-n3
basis: Observed per-row gateway costs from results/shallowswe-repair-loop-preview-n3-18-clean-2026-07-05 (post-fix clean run, seed 0): gemini-3.5-flash[medium] $0.303/row, glm-5.2[high] $0.015/row, kimi-k2.7-code $0.036/row. One-shot rows (submission cap 1) are expected to cost at or below these repair-loop rows.

conservative_1_5x.notes: 1.5x margin over observed rates for one-shot trajectory variance
